'''âp-z-b-w''' ('''kapazbewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:publicize|publicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:publicize|publicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-z-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapazbewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazbewoko|thipazbewoko]] || [[word:jipazbewoko|jipazbewoko]] || [[word:shipazbewoko|shipazbewoko]] || [[word:kipazbewoko|kipazbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazbewoko|thuthupazbewoko]] || [[word:jujupazbewoko|jujupazbewoko]] || [[word:shushupazbewoko|shushupazbewoko]] || [[word:kukupazbewoko|kukupazbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazbewoko|thupazbewoko]] || [[word:jupazbewoko|jupazbewoko]] || [[word:shupazbewoko|shupazbewoko]] || [[word:kupazbewoko|kupazbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazbewoko|thupazbewoko]] || [[word:jupazbewoko|jupazbewoko]] || [[word:shupazbewoko|shupazbewoko]] || [[word:kupazbewoko|kupazbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazbewoko|thepazbewoko]] || [[word:jepazbewoko|jepazbewoko]] || [[word:shepazbewoko|shepazbewoko]] || [[word:kepazbewoko|kepazbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazbewoko|thothopazbewoko]] || [[word:jojopazbewoko|jojopazbewoko]] || [[word:shoshopazbewoko|shoshopazbewoko]] || [[word:kokopazbewoko|kokopazbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazbewoko|thopazbewoko]] || [[word:jopazbewoko|jopazbewoko]] || [[word:shopazbewoko|shopazbewoko]] || [[word:kopazbewoko|kopazbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazbewoko|thopazbewoko]] || [[word:jopazbewoko|jopazbewoko]] || [[word:shopazbewoko|shopazbewoko]] || [[word:kopazbewoko|kopazbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpazbewoko|thĂŠpazbewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpazbewoko|jĂŠpazbewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpazbewoko|shĂŠpazbewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpazbewoko|kĂŠpazbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazbewoko|thathapazbewoko]] || [[word:jajapazbewoko|jajapazbewoko]] || [[word:shashapazbewoko|shashapazbewoko]] || [[word:kakapazbewoko|kakapazbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazbewoko|thapazbewoko]] || [[word:japazbewoko|japazbewoko]] || [[word:shapazbewoko|shapazbewoko]] || [[word:kapazbewoko|kapazbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazbewoko|thapazbewoko]] || [[word:japazbewoko|japazbewoko]] || [[word:shapazbewoko|shapazbewoko]] || [[word:kapazbewoko|kapazbewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapazbewithi|shapazbewithi]] || [[word:shapazbewiji|shapazbewiji]] || [[word:shapazbewishi|shapazbewishi]] || [[word:shapazbewiki|shapazbewiki]]
